User.title: User
User.description: Represents a user's link between authentication and their profile data.

email.description: The user's email address, used for lookups.

profilePath.description: The full Firestore path to the user's detailed profile document (e.g., 'tenants/safeviate/personnel/xyz123').

parentRegulationCode.description: The code of the parent regulation, if this is a sub-regulation.

FindingLevel.title: Finding Level
FindingLevel.description: Represents a single audit finding level with its associated color.

color.description: The hex color code for the background of this level.

foregroundColor.description: The hex color code for the text of this level.

FindingLevelsSettings.title: Finding Levels Settings
FindingLevelsSettings.description: Represents the audit finding levels settings for a tenant.

ComplianceRequirement.title: Compliance Requirement
ComplianceRequirement.description: A single regulatory or internal compliance requirement.

regulationCode.description: The official code for the regulation (e.g., '141.02.2').

parentRegulationCode.description: The code of the parent regulation, if this is a sub-regulation.

regulationStatement.description: The short, official title or heading of the regulation.

technicalStandard.description: The full, detailed text body of the regulation.

companyReference.description: A reference to the internal manual or procedure (e.g., 'Ops Manual, Sec 4.2.1').

responsibleManagerId.description: The ID of the manager responsible for this requirement.

SafetyReport.title: Safety Report
SafetyReport.description: Represents a single safety report, from initial filing to final closure.

id.description: Unique identifier for the safety report.

reportNumber.description: A unique, sequential, human-readable report number (e.g., FLT-001).

reportType.description: The category of the event being reported.

status.description: The current stage of the report in its lifecycle.

submittedBy.description: The user ID of the person who filed the report.

submittedByName.description: The name of the user who filed the report.

submittedAt.description: Timestamp of when the report was submitted.

closedDate.description: Timestamp of when the report was closed.

isAnonymous.description: If true, the submitter's identity is hidden.

location.description: The location where the event occurred.

aircraftId.description: The ID of the aircraft involved, if any.

description.description: A detailed narrative of the event.

phaseOfFlight.description: For flight operations, the phase of flight when the event occurred.

systemOrComponent.description: For defect reports, the specific system or component involved.

departmentId.description: The department ID responsible for handling the report.

occurrenceCategory.description: The official ICAO occurrence category assigned during triage.

eventClassification.description: The final classification of the event.

investigationTeam.description: List of personnel assigned to investigate the report.

initialHazards.description: Hazards identified during the initial risk assessment.

investigationTasks.description: A list of tasks for the investigation team.

investigationNotes.description: A summary of the investigation findings and root cause.

discussion.description: The discussion forum for the investigation team.

correctiveActions.description: The corrective action plan (CAP) to address the root cause.

mitigatedHazards.description: Re-assessed hazards after corrective actions are implemented.

role.description: Role at time of signing (e.g., Safety Manager)

signatureUrl.description: Data URL of the signature image.

ManagementOfChange.title: Management of Change
ManagementOfChange.description: Represents a Management of Change (MOC) record.

mocNumber.description: A unique, sequential, human-readable MOC number (e.g., MOC-001).

title.description: A clear, concise title for the change.

description.description: A detailed explanation of what is changing.

reason.description: The reason why the change is being made.

scope.description: Who and what will be affected by the change.

proposingDepartmentId.description: The ID of the department proposing the change.

responsiblePersonId.description: The ID of the person responsible for the proposal.

proposedBy.description: The user ID of the person who initiated the change.

proposalDate.description: Timestamp of when the MOC was proposed.

phases.description: The major stages of implementing the change.

LogbookTemplate.title: Logbook Template
LogbookTemplate.description: Represents a saved structure for a flight logbook.

name.description: The user-defined name for this template.

columns.description: The structured columns of the logbook table, allowing for nesting.

AircraftModelProfile.title: Aircraft Model Profile
AircraftModelProfile.description: Represents a mass and balance template for a specific aircraft make and model.

profileName.description: The unique name for this M&B profile.

emptyWeight.description: The standard empty weight of this aircraft model (in lbs).

emptyWeightMoment.description: The standard moment of this model at its empty weight (in lbs-in).

stationArms.description: Defines the arm (distance from datum in inches) for each station.

baggage1.description: Arm for the primary baggage area.

baggage2.description: Arm for the secondary baggage area, if applicable.

stations.description: A list of loading stations for the aircraft model.

cgEnvelope.description: An array of {x, y} objects defining the vertices of the CG envelope polygon.

xMin.description: Minimum value for the CG chart's X-axis (CG).

xMax.description: Maximum value for the CG chart's X-axis (CG).

yMin.description: Minimum value for the CG chart's Y-axis (Weight).

yMax.description: Maximum value for the CG chart's Y-axis (Weight).

PilotProfile.title: PilotProfile
PilotProfile.description: Represents a pilot's profile, including students, private pilots, and instructors.

id.description: Unique identifier for the PilotProfile entity.

role.description: The ID of the role assigned to the user.

contactNumber.description: The contact phone number of the pilot.

logbookTemplateId.description: The ID of the logbook template assigned to this pilot.

Personnel.title: Personnel
Personnel.description: Represents a non-flying staff member at the aviation academy.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Personnel entity.

userType.description: The category of the user, fixed to 'Personnel'.

role.description: The ID of the role assigned to the personnel.

permissions.description: An array of permission IDs (strings) associated with this person, potentially overriding the role.

department.description: The ID of the department the personnel belongs to.

contactNumber.description: The contact phone number of the personnel.

issueDate.description: The date the license was issued.

ratings.description: List of ratings held by the pilot.

endorsements.description: List of endorsements held by the pilot.

Documents.title: Documents
Documents.description: A list of documents associated with a user or aircraft.

Aircraft.title: Aircraft
Aircraft.description: Represents an aircraft used for training.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Aircraft entity.

make.description: The manufacturer of the aircraft (e.g., Cessna).

frameHours.description: Total hours on the aircraft frame.

tachoAtNext50Inspection.description: Tacho reading at which the next 50-hour inspection is due.

tachoAtNext100Inspection.description: Tacho reading at which the next 100-hour inspection is due.

maintenanceLogs.description: References to MaintenanceLog entries. (Relationship: Aircraft 1:N MaintenanceLog)

emptyWeight.description: The basic empty weight of the aircraft (in lbs).

emptyWeightMoment.description: The moment of the aircraft at its basic empty weight (in lbs-in).

stationArms.description: Defines the arm (distance from datum in inches) for each station.

baggage1.description: Arm for the primary baggage area.

baggage2.description: Arm for the secondary baggage area.

stations.description: A list of loading stations for the aircraft.

cgEnvelope.description: An array of {weight, cg} objects defining the vertices of the CG envelope polygon.

AircraftComponent.title: Aircraft Component
AircraftComponent.description: Represents a single trackable component on an aircraft.

MaintenanceLog.title: MaintenanceLog
MaintenanceLog.description: Represents a maintenance log entry for an aircraft.

id.description: Unique identifier for the MaintenanceLog entity.

procedure.description: Details of the maintenance procedure followed.

Permission.title: Permission
Permission.description: Represents a permission within the application, typically generated from the menu structure.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Permission entity, often derived from the menu href.

name.description: The human-readable name of the permission (e.g., 'Users').

description.description: A description of what the permission grants.

Role.title: Role
Role.description: Represents a role within the application, defining a set of permissions.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Role entity.

permissions.description: An array of permission IDs (strings) associated with this role.

requiredDocuments.description: A list of document names that a user with this role is required to upload.

Tenant.title: Tenant
Tenant.description: Represents a Tenant on the system.

Theme.title: Theme
Theme.description: Represents the application theme for a tenant.

FeatureSettings.title: Feature Settings
FeatureSettings.description: Represents tenant-wide feature flags and settings.

id.description: Unique identifier for the feature settings document.

preFlightChecklistRequired.description: If true, pre-flight checklists are mandatory and block subsequent bookings if not completed.

WarningPeriod.title: WarningPeriod
WarningPeriod.description: Represents a single document expiry warning period with its associated color.

period.description: The number of days before expiration to send a warning.

color.description: The hex color code associated with this warning period.

DocumentExpiry.title: DocumentExpiry
DocumentExpiry.description: Represents the document expiry warning settings for a tenant.

defaultColor.description: The hex color code for documents not within any warning period.

expiredColor.description: The hex color code for documents that have expired.

warningPeriods.description: An array of warning period objects.

Department.title: Department
Department.description: Represents a department within a tenant.

currentNumber.description: The last number that was used.

AuditScheduleItem.title: Audit Schedule Item
AuditScheduleItem.description: Represents the status of a single audit area for a specific quarter and year.

QualityAuditChecklistTemplate.title: Quality Audit Checklist Template
QualityAuditChecklistTemplate.description: A reusable template for conducting quality audits.

ChecklistSection.title: Checklist Section
ChecklistSection.description: A section within a quality audit checklist template.

AuditChecklistItem.title: Audit Checklist Item
AuditChecklistItem.description: A single item within a quality audit checklist section.

QualityAudit.title: Quality Audit
QualityAudit.description: An instance of a quality audit performed using a template.

QualityFinding.title: Quality Finding
QualityFinding.description: A specific finding recorded during a quality audit.

suggestedImprovements.description: Suggested improvements related to the finding.

CorrectiveActionPlan.title: Corrective Action Plan
CorrectiveActionPlan.description: A plan to address a non-conformance identified in an audit.

StudentProgressReport.title: Student Progress Report
StudentProgressReport.description: Represents a student's progress report for a specific training session.

instructorSignatureUrl.description: Data URL of the instructor's signature image.

studentSignatureUrl.description: Data URL of the student's signature image.

StudentProgressEntry.title: Student Progress Entry
StudentProgressEntry.description: A single entry within a student progress report.

StudentMilestoneSettings.title: Student Milestone Settings
StudentMilestoneSettings.description: Settings for student flight hour milestone warnings.

warningHours.description: The hour threshold at which to show a warning.

Alert.title: Alert
Alert.description: Represents a system-wide alert or notice.

title.description: A short, descriptive title for the alert.

content.description: The full content of the alert or notice.

createdBy.description: The user ID of the person who created the alert.

SpiConfig.title: SPI Config
SpiConfig.description: Defines a single Safety Performance Indicator.

SpiConfigurations.title: SPI Configurations
SpiConfigurations.description: A document that stores the list of all SPI configurations for a tenant.

RiskMatrixSettings.title: Risk Matrix Settings
RiskMatrixSettings.description: Stores the color configuration for the risk assessment matrix.

colors.description: A map of cell IDs (e.g., '5A') to hex color strings.

MassAndBalance.title: Mass and Balance
MassAndBalance.description: Holds a reference or a snapshot of the mass and balance calculation for a flight.

Booking.title: Booking
Booking.description: Represents a single booking for a resource like an aircraft.

definition.description: Stores a link between a Firebase Auth user and their profile document.
Stores table structures published to specific pages.
Stores saved table designs from the Table Builder.
Stores individual regulatory compliance items.
Stores the status of audit areas for specific quarters.
Stores templates for quality audits.
Stores instances of quality audits.
Stores corrective action plans for audit findings.
Stores organizational risks for each tenant.
Stores safety reports for each tenant.
Stores Management of Change records for each tenant.
Stores saved structures for flight logbooks.
Stores M&B templates for aircraft models.
Stores tenant information. All other collections except users are tenant specific.
Stores non-flying staff information, scoped to a specific tenant.
Stores pilot profile information (students, instructors, private pilots), scoped to a specific tenant.
Stores aircraft information, scoped to a specific tenant.
Stores trackable components for a specific aircraft.
Stores maintenance log entries for a specific aircraft, scoped to a specific tenant.
Stores roles, scoped to a specific tenant.
Stores all available application permissions, scoped to a specific tenant.
Stores document expiry warning settings.
Stores audit finding levels.
Stores feature flags.
Stores student milestone settings.
Stores the configuration for Safety Performance Indicators.
Stores the configuration for the risk matrix colors.
Stores departments, scoped to a specific tenant.
Stores distributed counters for generating sequential IDs.
Stores student progress reports for training flights.
Stores system-wide alerts and notices.
Stores all aircraft and resource bookings.
